name: pvyai-local-agent-quality
description: Clean-room local fixture suite for exercising PVYai coding-agent task success without provider or network calls.

tasks.name: Document stream JSON verify events
tasks.description: Docs-only, low-risk task covering the verify and self-verify JSON event contract.
tasks.prompt: Update the stream-json protocol docs so maintainers can see how `pvyai verify --json` and `pvyai selfverify --json` report start, check, summary, and error events. Keep the wording accurate, local-first, deterministic, and do not change runtime code.

tasks.name: Separate Go release checks from Node wrapper checks
tasks.description: Docs-only task that keeps npm wrapper guidance honest and dependency-free.
tasks.prompt: Improve the npm wrapper smoke checklist so a maintainer can distinguish Go release checks from direct `bin/pvyai.js` wrapper checks. Keep Node usage limited to the wrapper itself, avoid provider or network calls, and do not add Bun, TypeScript, or package build dependencies.

tasks.name: Add provider catalog stability coverage
tasks.description: Test-only task for model registry aliases and provider names.
tasks.prompt: Add focused tests for provider catalog defaults so common model aliases and provider display names remain stable. Keep the change inside the model registry package, use only the local fixture code, and do not call provider APIs.

tasks.name: Tighten config validation errors
tasks.description: Small Go behavior task for deterministic config validation errors.
tasks.prompt: Make config validation return actionable errors when the default provider is missing from the provider map, and cover the behavior with a table test. Do not change config file locations, environment variable names, or provider lookup semantics.

tasks.name: Preserve MCP server order
tasks.description: Regression task for deterministic MCP configuration output.
tasks.prompt: Add coverage showing MCP server names are emitted in deterministic sorted order when rendering config summaries. Keep the production change, if any, inside the MCP config package and do not introduce external dependencies.

tasks.name: Clarify agent permission denial copy
tasks.description: Prompt and test task for local permission-denial messaging.
tasks.prompt: Clarify the local agent system prompt so denied file operations explain the blocked path and the next safe action. Add a focused test that checks the denial guidance without depending on a live model or provider response.

tasks.name: Add release smoke dry-run note
tasks.description: Release-facing task that ties docs to local smoke behavior.
tasks.prompt: Update the release smoke guidance and tests so maintainers can tell when a smoke run is using an already-built local binary. Keep the checks local, deterministic, and limited to the release command fixture.

tasks.name: Add npm wrapper argv helper
tasks.description: Small Go task that improves wrapper command construction without adding JavaScript tooling.
tasks.prompt: Refactor the npm wrapper helper to expose a reusable `WrapperCommand(args ...string) []string` that always prefixes `node bin/pvyai.js`, then update `DirectCommand` to use it for `--version`. Add focused tests for argument preservation. Keep Node usage limited to invoking `bin/pvyai.js` and do not add Bun, TypeScript, or package build dependencies.
